name: Traditional Sweet-Sour Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. You can substitute chicken for pork if you prefer.
2. Place pork chops in a 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking dish.
3. In a bowl, combine pineapple juice, ketchup, honey, vinegar, mustard and salt. Pour over the chops.
4. Cover tightly and bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.
5. Uncover and bake an additional 30 minutes longer or until meat is tender.
6. Remove chops from pan to a serving platter and keep warm.
7. Strain pan juices into a saucepan.
8. Combine cornstarch and water; add to pan juices.
9. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly, then cook and stir for 2 more minutes.
10. Pour sauce over chops and serve immediately.
